per_criterion.name: Artwork craft & genuine detail
per_criterion.note: low-poly terrain coarse under zoom; S2 raised-plate hero reads flat. Recurring series ceiling.

one_sentence_fix: Deliver the S2 depth hero as a genuinely raised cadastral plate (layered cast shadow + lit top bevel + extruded side face) and grade the low-poly terrain to finer relief, so the deck's one dimensional moment stops reading as a glowing flat outline.
revision_rounds: 1 pixel cycle (all 9 shipped round 1) + 1 flow cycle (S4 tether, S5 tighten)
